title: Lawyers
description: Represent clients in criminal and civil litigation and other legal proceedings, draw up legal documents, or manage or advise clients on legal transactions. May specialize in a single area or may practice broadly in many areas of law.

tasks.text: Interpret laws, rulings and regulations for individuals and businesses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze the probable outcomes of cases, using knowledge of legal precedents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Gather evidence to formulate defense or to initiate legal actions by such means as interviewing clients and witnesses to ascertain the facts of a case.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent clients in court or before government agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate findings and develop strategies and arguments in preparation for presentation of cases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise clients concerning business transactions, claim liability, advisability of prosecuting or defending lawsuits, or legal rights and obligations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine legal data to determine advisability of defending or prosecuting lawsuit.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare, draft, and review legal documents, such as wills, deeds, patent applications, mortgages, leases, and contracts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Study Constitution, statutes, decisions, regulations, and ordinances of quasi-judicial bodies to determine ramifications for cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate settlements of civil disputes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise legal assistants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate contractual agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with colleagues with specialties in appropriate areas of legal issue to establish and verify bases for legal proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Search for and examine public and other legal records to write opinions or establish ownership.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform administrative and management functions related to the practice of law.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present and summarize cases to judges and juries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select jurors, argue motions, meet with judges, and question witnesses during the course of a trial.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Present evidence to defend clients or prosecute defendants in criminal or civil litigation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Probate wills and represent and advise executors and administrators of estates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare legal briefs and opinions, and file appeals in state and federal courts of appeal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Act as agent, trustee, guardian, or executor for businesses or individuals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Help develop federal and state programs, draft and interpret laws and legislation, and establish enforcement procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
